commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

evaluation.critique: The component has a reasonable structure but suffers from inconsistent design token usage (hardcoded colors like '#f4f4f5' and '#52525b' in ForecastStrip), inconsistent unit handling across components (WeatherStats hardcodes 'km/h' instead of using props), and incomplete implementation (MainView container definition is cut off). Data presentation issues include overriding user-provided units and missing use of the format utilities from constants.ts.

commit.name: Interactive Periodic Table
commit.description: CSS Grid periodic table with category coloring, search, and detail panel
commit.prompt:
Build an interactive periodic table of elements.

Layout:
- CSS Grid: 18 columns. Place each element using gridRow and gridColumn from its data.
- Each cell: symbol (large, centered), atomic number (small, top-left)
- Color-code by category using design tokens (e.g., noble-gas → one color, halogen → another)
- Search input at top — filters by name or symbol (case-insensitive)
- Click an element → detail panel below grid shows: name, symbol, atomicNumber, atomicWeight, category
- Legend showing each category with its color

All element data comes from props.elements. Use design system CSS variables.

issues.description: The main component file (components/index.tsx) is truncated mid-code, causing the application to be fundamentally incomplete and unable to render the layout properly.
issues.fix: Complete the JSX in components/index.tsx to render the ElementCell grid and DetailPanel.

issues.description: Category color-coding is missing from the ElementCell. The background color is hardcoded to a static surface color instead of reflecting the category from the provided mapping.
issues.fix: Pass the category mapping into ElementCell and set the background-color dynamic to the category color.

issues.description: Multiple files are duplicated in the provided snippet (e.g., DetailPanel.tsx, Legend.tsx) containing redundant or conflicting imports and placeholder content.
issues.fix: Clean up redundant imports and remove the half-implemented/placeholder MainView exports from those files.

issues.description: The grid is implemented as a set of divs with onClick handlers without keyboard support (onKeyDown), meaning it is not natively accessible to screen reader or keyboard-only users.
issues.fix: Add role='button', tabIndex={0}, and keyboard event handlers (Enter/Space) to the clickable ElementCells.

evaluations.critique: The project structure is fragmented and the final component file is truncated, preventing a successful build. While the individual sub-components show promise, the lack of color-coding implementation in the grid cells and the broken code flow significantly hinder the functionality.

commit.name: Onboarding Wizard
commit.description: Multi-step onboarding flow with step indicator and validation
commit.prompt:
Build a 3-step onboarding wizard. Steps:

Step 1 - Profile Setup:
- Name input (required)
- Email input (required, validate email format)
- Avatar selection (choose from 4 emoji avatars)

Step 2 - Preferences:
- Role selection (dropdown: Developer, Designer, Manager, Other)
- Notification toggle (email notifications on/off)
- Theme preference (light/dark toggle)

Step 3 - Review & Confirm:
- Summary of all selections from steps 1-2
- "Go Back" button to edit
- "Complete Setup" button to submit

Requirements:
- Step indicator at top showing current step (1/2/3) with progress bar
- Back/Next navigation (Next disabled until required fields valid)
- Smooth transition between steps
- Call props.onComplete with all collected data on final submit
- All initial values from props (for editing existing profile)
- Use design system CSS variables for all styling

initialProfile.description: Pre-filled profile data for editing (all fields optional)

avatarOptions.description: Available avatar emojis to choose from

roleOptions.description: Available role options for the dropdown

complete.label: Complete Setup
complete.description: Called with all profile data when user completes onboarding

issues.description: The provided code is truncated at the main entry point and does not render the component, nor does it implement the full logic wired to the provided hook.
issues.fix: Complete the MainView component by implementing the rendering logic that uses the hook and conditionally displays steps.

issues.description: The main component is partially written and fails to utilize the custom useComponent hook provided in the source file, opting for a local useState instead.
issues.fix: Refactor MainView to use the imported useComponent hook for state management.

issues.description: The avatar selection box uses an 'onClick' on a div without 'role=button' or keyboard handling (onKeyDown).
issues.fix: Add 'role="button"', 'tabIndex={0}', and a keyboard event handler to the avatar selection items.

evaluations.critique: The component structure and sub-components are well-defined, but the submission is incomplete due to a truncated main file. The logic inside the hook is solid, but the main component fails to actually integrate the hook or handle step transitions as requested.
